content: among non limited caro units, which one provides the best sustain for the team?
this is an eldritch game... those things aren't mutually exclusive!!!
I would say leigh? Her heals are not bad. For defense imm not sure tbh, agrippa idk how to use her

I use both cuz I like them, even tho I'm not sure if they are good.
Agrippa is great for embryo build up ig. She can double the amount we have 
Her shield is okay ig. There are better shielders in other colors..
Yeah…
I'm not sure if Leigh is good, her stats are bad, all of them. Her heal on ult has low scaling, but she has missing HP heals there
She can build embryo fast tho
If that's a plus
Yah
I think faint
And she shield more the lower your HP is
Her kit is tied with death resistance
Which are quite nice since caro uses hp

I have faint but not building her cuz I don't like her.
Idk how she works but she looks like a good healer
I'm not sure how death resistance works since naturally ppl avoid hitting 0 HP.
Iirc for ex 100% is like 100 hp
150% is 150 hp and so on
I might be wronf tho
death resist is % based
so if u have 50%
u have 50% chance to resist 1 hit
then lost half
then next turn u get extra draw and mana
so if u have 250% it means u have 100% chance to resist 1 hit then gets reduced to 125% and so on
also halves future death resist gains everytime it procs
i use both leigh and faint personally
Wait a minute
It only resist one hit right
So if enemy use multi hit attack you lost it
1 hit reduces ur chances by half
Again
if u have high death resist u can resist multi hit
since it will go like 250 -> 125 -> 62.5
If I have 200 I can guarantee resisting 2 hits wow
if u use uvhash u kinda want to stay low hp so i play around death resist a lot
the lower ur hp is, the higher ur dmg output
the higher ur dmg is, the faster monster die
the faster monster die, the more hp saves
so
the lower ur hp, the higher ur hp 😈
less is more !
using Tulu is fun
I play Uvash too cuz I like him, I thought he is strong until I unlock other carry
1hp
which one?
The one you like the most aka the waifu

I picked nymphea because I already have whip spider that lets me kill bosses by stacking poison damage. its like how darkest dungeon lets you kill things several times your level if you know how to stack debuffs
well damn
I didnt know Bloodstarved beast was in the game
I meant Cleric Beast
devourer of gods
that was an annoying boss fight
20k Defence
where is that?
basically last boss
i see
am gonna rest for a bit
sure I did like twice
and had deaths door maybe 4 times
Darkest Dungeon Reference
Im actually glad they added a death's door function in this game

Same server

steam also doesnt have a link between devices, but iirc there's a separate pc ver that does link to the mobile version

It's official client from them

Currently you can't link your steam account to mobile
steam cannot be linked to anything YET

i wonder the same
the game isn't suitable for an auto system
if you mean an auto system where it just blatantly uses all your cards to match your arithmetical point and end your turn
you will end up losing 99% of your battle match anw
for pve you might be able to drown easier levels in raw stat advantage though
Thanks
I see. It's just very time-consuming to do pvp and pve without the auto esp for mobs in story stages
why you even bother doing pvp
I never touch pvp
I mean pvp is for people who enjoy wasting time on it
and by wasting time, I literally mean it
pvp didn't give you anything
except for emoji and avatar
pvp gives you the joy of crushing your opponent with your superior skills (i.e. you drew into what you needed and your opponent bricked)
like I said "Wasting time"
enjoy the wasting time
but if someone feels "time cosuming"
that doesn't sound like someone enjoys it that much
not exaclty, auto system is way more smart thant that, but even if you lose you press retry and go manual.
even more time consuming than manual in the first place
especially for endgame content and high level event quest.
